notes: More philosophical/scientific than Weltraum. Refers to the entire cosmos.

sentences.german: Wissenschaftler erforschen das Universum seit Jahrhunderten.
sentences.english: Scientists have been exploring the universe for centuries.

cloze_sentences.text: In der Theorie gibt es viele parallele {{c1::Universen}}.
cloze_sentences.english: In theory there are many parallel universes.
